NA = NA - Patient does not have a telephone.
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0770_PR_PHONE_USE (M0770) Prior Ability to Use Telephone Prior ability to use telephone. 00 = Able to dial numbers and answer calls appropriately and as desired.
01 = Able to use a specially adapted telephone (i.e., large numbers on the dial, teletype phone for the deaf) and call essential numbers.
02 = Able to answer the telephone and carry on a normal conversation but has
